registry_tweaks.name: Disable Auto-Restart After Updates
registry_tweaks.description: Prevents Windows from auto-restarting after updates without user consent

registry_tweaks.name: Disable Consumer Features
registry_tweaks.description: Disables suggested apps and consumer experience features

registry_tweaks.name: Disable Lock Screen Ads
registry_tweaks.description: Removes ads and suggestions from the lock screen

registry_tweaks.name: Show File Extensions
registry_tweaks.description: Shows file extensions in File Explorer

registry_tweaks.name: Disable Startup Programs Delay
registry_tweaks.description: Removes the startup delay for applications
